Nimbus Ridge Technologies

Empowering enterprises with scalable, intelligent cloud infrastructure for the modern era

LEAD CLOUD ENGINEER

San Francisco, CA / Remote · Full-time · $175,000 - $235,000 USD

Nimbus Ridge Technologies is seeking a Lead Cloud Engineer to build and mentor a team of cloud

infrastructure engineers. In this role, you'll architect large-scale AWS solutions, drive infrastructure-

as-code best practices across the organization, and lead strategic initiatives in cloud cost

optimization and security. You'll own end-to-end cloud platform reliability, mentor 4-6 engineers, and

partner with cross-functional teams to deliver enterprise-grade infrastructure solutions. This is an

excellent opportunity for someone with 6+ years of cloud experience who thrives in technical

leadership and wants to shape how modern companies build on the cloud.

ABOUT US

Nimbus Ridge Technologies is a Series B cloud infrastructure and DevOps automation company
founded in 2019. We help mid-to-enterprise organizations architect, deploy, and optimize cloud-

native solutions across AWS, Azure, and hybrid environments. Our platform combines infrastructure-
as-code expertise with AI-driven cost optimization to reduce cloud spending while improving

performance and security. With over 150 employees across San Francisco, Austin, and Dublin, we're
trusted by Fortune 500 companies to modernize their infrastructure.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 4-6 cloud engineers; conduct code reviews, design
reviews, and provide constructive feedback to foster technical growth

Architect enterprise-scale AWS solutions (VPC, EC2, Lambda, RDS, S3) incorporating security,
scalability, and cost-efficiency best practices

Own the design, implementation, and maintenance of infrastructure-as-code frameworks using
Terraform and CloudFormation; establish organizational standards and reusable modules

Drive cloud cost optimization initiatives; analyze spending patterns, identify waste, and
implement cost-saving strategies that have delivered 20-40% savings for clients

Establish CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices; ensure team adoption of containerization

(Docker) and orchestration (Kubernetes) for production workloads

Lead on-call rotations and incident response for critical infrastructure; mentor team members
through troubleshooting and resolution of complex cloud infrastructure issues

Collaborate with Security and Compliance teams to implement IAM policies, network
segmentation, encryption standards, and audit logging across AWS accounts

Represent Nimbus Ridge in customer architecture discussions and technical deep-dives;
translate business requirements into scalable, secure cloud solutions

 Champion observability and monitoring practices; implement CloudWatch, Prometheus, and

alerting strategies to ensure 99.99% uptime SLAs

REQUIRED

6+ years of hands-on experience designing, deploying, and operating cloud infrastructure on

AWS (EC2, VPC, IAM, Lambda, RDS, S3, CloudFront)

3+ years of proven experience leading, mentoring, or managing technical teams; demonstrated

ability to grow engineers' skills and drive team performance

Expert-level proficiency with infrastructure-as-code tools; strong hands-on experience with

Terraform and/or CloudFormation

Deep understanding of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs, security groups,

NACLs) and experience designing secure, scalable VPC architectures

Proficiency in Linux/Unix system administration and at least one scripting language (Python,

Bash, or Go)

Demonstrated experience with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes, or

ECS); ability to architect containerized application deployment strategies

Strong understanding of AWS security best practices, IAM policies, KMS encryption, and
compliance frameworks (SOC2, HIPAA)

NICE TO HAVE

Experience with multi-cloud deployments (AWS + Azure or GCP); knowledge of cloud
interoperability patterns

Hands-on experience with cloud cost optimization tools and practices (AWS Cost Explorer,

Spot Instances, Reserved Instances, Savings Plans)

Track record of open-source contributions or speaking engagements in DevOps/cloud
communities

AWS Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional, or equivalent
certification

Experience implementing infrastructure monitoring and observability stacks (CloudWatch,

Prometheus, Grafana, ELK)

Familiarity with GitOps workflows and tools (ArgoCD, Flux)

TECH STACK

AWS (EC2, VPC, Lambda, RDS, S3, CloudFront, IAM, CloudWatch)

  Terraform   CloudFormation   Docker

Kubernetes   Python   Bash/Shell Scripting   Git/GitHub   Prometheus & Grafana   AWS Cost Optimization Tools

BENEFITS

Competitive salary and equity package (0.10-0.25% depending on experience)

Comprehensive health coverage: medical, dental, vision (80% company-paid)

Professional development budget: $3,000/year for courses, certifications, and conferences

Flexible work environment: remote-first with optional office access in San Francisco and Austin

 Generous PTO: 20 days + 10 company holidays + unlimited sick leave

Home office equipment stipend: $1,500 for remote-first employees

401(k) with 4% company match

Parental leave: 16 weeks fully paid

HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please submit your resume, a brief cover letter highlighting your team leadership

experience and most impactful cloud architecture project, and links to your GitHub profile or portfolio.

Apply directly through our careers page at www.nimbusridge.careers or email

leads@nimbusridge.tech. Referrals are encouraged—current employees can submit referrals via the

internal portal with a $3,000 bonus upon hire.
